mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_project_handover_log (project_id, handover_type, from_user_id, to_user_id, from_dept_code, to_dept_code, reason, operator_id, created_at) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{handoverType}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{fromDeptCode}, #{toDeptCode}, #{reason}, #{operatorId}, NOW())
